checks.observed: Mint landed on /ar with lang=ar dir=rtl and NEXT_LOCALE=ar cookie.
Dashboard greeting and tab bar were Arabic with no Hebrew in chrome.
Quiz showed Arabic option labels; question body included Hebrew fallback text (see F-001 question).
Flashcards UI labels Arabic; first flipped sign name rendered Hebrew fallback (see F-002 question).
Reload of /ar kept locale; bare / redirected to /ar per cookie.
Medal date used Arabic numerals and month name (١٥ يوليو).
No console errors observed in Arabic sweep.
lang/dir correct; headings and buttons present on swept pages.
Arabic UI strings rendered RTL without raw keys in chrome.

findings.title: Arabic quiz shows Hebrew question body fallback on signs topic
findings.expected: Arabic question_ar content or documented fallback.
findings.actual: Question stem mixed Hebrew with Arabic option labels.

findings.title: Arabic flashcard back shows Hebrew sign name for sign 103
findings.actual: Back face showed עקומה חדה שמאלה (Hebrew).

limitations: Language toggle round-trip on /ar/more not re-tested after prior 006 run
